sessionStart.comment: Auto-detect SpecKit artifacts, check git branch, validate environment

sessionEnd.comment: Generate session summary from audit log

userPromptSubmitted.comment: Inject advisory conductor-first routing unless the user explicitly requested a specialist
Capture user prompt to log for scope verification reference

subagentStart.comment: Inject delegated-scope and reporting guidance into subagents when the runtime supports subagent lifecycle hooks

subagentStop.comment: Block subagents from stopping on empty or placeholder-only completions when the runtime supports subagent lifecycle hooks

preToolUse.comment: Consolidated guard: protected-files, no-heredoc, git-safety, conductor-delegation, completion-file, mandatory-ui-gates

postToolUse.comment: Log every tool invocation to structured JSONL audit trail

errorOccurred.comment: Log tool errors to audit trail and increment session error counter
